<!--
Thanks for opening a PR! A few things to make review fast:
- Link the issue this PR closes (or explain why no issue is needed)
- Keep PRs small — easier to review, faster to merge
- Substantial changes (API, breaking changes, new integrations) need an RFC first → https://github.com/hartemyaakoub/liqaa-rfcs
-->

## What

<!-- One sentence describing the change. -->

## Why

## How to test

<!-- Steps a reviewer can follow to verify the change. -->

```
1.
2.
3.
```

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Manual test: created a room, joined, left, recap rendered
- [ ] No new dependencies > 50 KB without prior discussion
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
- [ ] Updated `docs/architecture.md` if architectural
